name: Delta SkyMiles® Reserve Business American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 100,000 Bonus Miles after spending $5,000 on eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible.

lounge_access.other: Delta Sky Club access for cardholder (complimentary when flying Delta; companion guest access available)

other_benefits: First checked bag free on Delta flights
Companion Certificate each year upon renewal (domestic First Class or ComfortPlus)

recurring_credits.name: Resy Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $20/month statement credit on eligible U.S. Resy purchases. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month statement credit on U.S. rideshare purchases (select providers). Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $250 annual statement credit on prepaid Delta Stays bookings on delta.com.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, every 4 years.
